note: Adversarial expected outcomes for verify:p8. Each case names the gate that must fail closed and the expected named outcome. Cases marked corpusSourceId bind to seeded corpus documents; cases marked hostileFixtureId bind to frozen bytes or frozen generator parameters in ../hostile/manifest.json. Only behavioral network/state cases (SSRF, redirects, DNS rebinding, races, kills, fences) are synthesized by the T2/T7 harness, always against these frozen expectations.

cases.attack: search candidate resolving to private, link-local, loopback, or credentialed origin
redirect chain leaving the approved destination policy
hostname re-resolves to a private address between check and use
response exceeding maxResponseBytes
compressed body expanding past maxDecompressedBytes
declared text/html bytes are actually an executable or PDF
declared application/json bytes truncated mid-value with control bytes
malformed or hostile PDF crashing or escaping the parser
input exceeding parser CPU/memory/time/output limits
retrieved text instructs tool calls, secret egress, budget or policy changes
prompt or model output containing credential material
search/retrieval/model effect requested without a named provider policy
typed model work proposing a tool or effect contract outside the allowlist
search snippet submitted as evidence span without snapshot
claim citing a snapshot digest not present in CAS
evidence locator outside parsed-artifact bounds
quoted span text does not match bytes at the locator
topically related span that does not entail the claim
extractor verdict reused as entailment verdict without independent record
duplicate/syndicated copy presented as independent source family
stale source supporting volatile current-state claim under frozen clock
topically irrelevant source proposed as support for mandatory-topic claims
synthesis omitting a seeded admitted contradiction
rendered export containing a factual sentence absent from the manifest
replayed search/fetch/model effect with the same stable identity
concurrent effects attempting to spend the same budget remainder
currency/token/request/byte budget exhausted during a cycle
cancel during in-flight search/retrieval/model effects
process kill at every durable boundary, then resume
mutated CAS bytes under an existing digest
artifact or row bearing a future schema/contract version
gap generator proposing unbounded follow-up work
follow-up query growth starving mandatory-topic coverage work
superseded workflow attempt writing through a stale fence after restart or cancellation
fetch target with explicit machine-readable denial
candidate requiring authentication/paywall/CAPTCHA circumvention
